definition:
1. (Homer) of wind, rain, etc., furious, boisterous , (Herdotus Historicus); λ. πῦρ, κύματα, πόντος, etc., (Euripides) 
2. after (Homer), of men, boisterous, turbulent, violent , (Theognis Elegiacus), etc. 
3. greedy , (Pindar) 
4. adverb λάβρως, violently, furiously , (Theognis Elegiacus) 
5. greedily , (Aeschulus Tragicus) (ML)
